topic: Automatic Lead Assignment using Councillor Mapper
summary: This topic describes the 'Councillor Mapper' settings, which enable automatic assignment of leads to counselors based on specific courses or sources using the 'Round Robin' method, with two distinct types: 'All' and 'Devise'.
steps: Select the specific courses or sources for which leads need to be automatically assigned.
Select multiple counselors who will receive leads from these chosen courses/sources.
The system will then automatically assign leads to the selected counselors one by one using the configured Round Robin method.
business_rules: **Round Robin 'All'**: This method aims to balance the lead load among all assigned counselors. If a new counselor is added, they will receive leads exclusively until their lead count matches that of existing counselors, after which leads are distributed one-by-one to all.

**Round Robin 'Devise'**: This method assigns leads strictly one-by-one in a sequential order to all assigned counselors, irrespective of their current lead counts or when they were added to the system.
important_notes: Councillor Mapper significantly reduces manual lead assignment efforts.
Understanding the difference between 'All' and 'Devise' Round Robin is crucial for effective lead distribution strategy.
questions: How do I set up automatic lead assignment to counselors?
What is the 'Round Robin' method for lead assignment?
Explain the difference between 'All' and 'Devise' Round Robin in lead assignment.
Can I assign leads to counselors based on specific sources or courses?
Where can I configure counselor lead mapping?
